name: Safe synthetic playbook: Privilege escalation signal (role change)
description: Identity governance alert where a non-admin principal receives a privileged cloud role assignment outside change windows. Describes IAM graph deltas only—no abuse of delegated admin, no takeover steps.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Cloud audit stub records RoleBinding LAB_ADMIN_BRIDGE attached to user lab-contractor-grey-77.
SoD rule simulation flags contractor + admin archetype conflict.
Automatic revocation simulated pending human validation of change ticket linkage.

events_emitted.headline: Privileged assignment without ticket linkage
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Demonstrates IAM governance lapse detection pathway.

events_emitted.headline: Consolidated privilege risk finding
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Feeds SoD dashboards and remediation queue.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Segregation-of-duties expectations invoked by unexpected admin bridge.
Escalation path for possible malicious admin activity (simulation).

expected_remediation.summary: Revoke role binding, require MFA + PAM for future admin actions, review identity provider logs (stub).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Open emergency IAM ticket with auto-assigned owner group.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Confirm whether assignment was legitimate emergency access requiring documentation instead of blind revoke.

expected_final_report.title: Privilege escalation signal — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Unexpected privileged binding was detected; playbook models IAM rollback and governance follow-up without executing takeover.
